'''dafanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibotenate|ibotenate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibotenate|ibotenate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dafanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæfængæth|dæfængæth]] || [[word:dæfængæj|dæfængæj]] || [[word:dæfængæsh|dæfængæsh]] || [[word:dæfængæ|dæfængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafafangath|dafafangath]] || [[word:dafafangaj|dafafangaj]] || [[word:dafafangash|dafafangash]] || [[word:dafafanga|dafafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafangath|dafangath]] || [[word:dafangaj|dafangaj]] || [[word:dafangash|dafangash]] || [[word:dafanga|dafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafafngath|dafafngath]] || [[word:dafafngaj|dafafngaj]] || [[word:dafafngash|dafafngash]] || [[word:dafafngaf|dafafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dafangatha|dafangatha]] || [[word:dafangaja|dafangaja]] || [[word:dafangasha|dafangasha]] || [[word:dafangaka|dafangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dafangath|dafangath]] || [[word:dafangaj|dafangaj]] || [[word:dafangash|dafangash]] || [[word:dafanga|dafanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dafangathal|dafangathal]] || [[word:dafangajal|dafangajal]] || [[word:dafangashal|dafangashal]] || [[word:dafangakal|dafangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dafangathatha|dafangathatha]] || [[word:dafangajaja|dafangajaja]] || [[word:dafangashasha|dafangashasha]] || [[word:dafangaka|dafangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dafangathan|dafangathan]] || [[word:dafangajan|dafangajan]] || [[word:dafangashan|dafangashan]] || [[word:dafangakan|dafangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dafangathaoro|dafangathaoro]] || [[word:dafangajaoro|dafangajaoro]] || [[word:dafangashaoro|dafangashaoro]] || [[word:dafangakaoro|dafangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
